input.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

output: Quick fox jumps over lazy dog.

input.text: To be or not to be, that is the question.

output: Debates whether to exist or not.

input.text: All that glitters is not gold.

output: Shiny things are not always valuable.

input.text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

output: Long journeys start with small steps.

input.text: Knowledge is power.
Actions speak louder than words.
The early bird catches the worm.
Practice makes perfect.
When in Rome, do as the Romans do.
Two heads are better than one.
The pen is mightier than the sword.

output: Words have more power than force.

input.text: Better late than never.
Rome was not built in a day.
Every cloud has a silver lining.
Time heals all wounds.
Do not put all your eggs in one basket.
The grass is always greener on the other side.

output: Others seem to have it better.

input.text: Where there is smoke, there is fire.
A picture is worth a thousand words.
Curiosity killed the cat.
